description: Master schema combining the Four Forces (Logos, Ethos, Pathos, Anima) with Tarot suits and Major Arcana correspondences. Supports both narrative and analytical applications.

Logos.summary: From clarity to confusion — how we shape truth.

poles.description: Reason seeks clarity; balance applies reason flexibly; distortion hardens into rigid certainty.
Observation enlightens; balance examines context; distortion strips meaning.
Imagination teaches through story; balance uses metaphor; distortion becomes fantasy detached from truth.
Speech persuades with care; balance instructs; distortion deceives.
Intuitive unity reveals insight; balance reflects quietly; distortion clouds with vagueness.

Ethos.summary: From stewardship to domination — how we act upon the world.

poles.description: Creation and improvement; balance maintains; distortion tears down.
Protection and care; balance guides fairly; distortion controls.
Guides by vision; balance organizes; distortion inflames for power.
Restores harmony; balance reconciles; distortion harms under guise of help.
Seeks discovery; balance investigates; distortion exploits.

Pathos.summary: From resonance to dissonance — how we feel and connect.

poles.description: Uplifting energy; balance steadiness; distortion hopelessness.
Connection and care; balance warmth; distortion rejection and cruelty.
Justice with clarity; balance confidence; distortion fury.
Openness to experience; balance alert attention; distortion paralysis.
Centered coherence; balance relaxation; distortion chaos.

Anima.summary: From sacred union to separation — how vitality circulates between opposites.

poles.description: Provides structure and safety; balance cooperates; distortion dominates.
Opens vision and purpose; balance inspires mutually; distortion seduces or deceives.
Offers freely; balance reciprocates; distortion clings or hoards.
Welcomes and synthesizes; balance absorbs wisely; distortion becomes needy.
Union of masculine spark and feminine field; balance maintains flow; distortion separates vitality.
